name: DTT Example Design System
description: Demonstrates all resolver features: sets, modifiers, contexts, permutations, inline items, and stacked context sources.

primitives.description: Raw design values — colors, spacing, type scales, radii

composite.description: Composite DTCG value types — border, shadow, gradient, typography, transition

theme.description: Color theme — light overrides semantic layer with light values, dark with dark values

contrast.description: Contrast mode — normal uses theme defaults, high stacks additional overrides on top
